problem id: 2d6922f4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00110110 -> 11000000
  01100000 -> 00000000
  10111100 -> 10000001
  00111010 -> 01000000
  11010100 -> 10000001
  10010110 -> 11000001
  11011110 -> 11000001
  01010001 -> 00100000
  00000111 -> 11100000

query: 00101100
predicted answer: 10000000
